Song.title: Song
Song.description: Represents a musical song or hymn, supporting bilingual content in English and French.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Song entity, must match the document ID.

number.description: The identifying number assigned to the song (e.g., '001').

author.description: The creator or writer of the song.

year.description: The year the song was composed or published.

partitionUrl.description: URL or Data URI for the sheet music image.

audioUrl.description: URL or Data URI for the audio recording.

/songs/{songId}.description: Collection of all musical songs or hymns. Document ID {songId} must match the 'id' field in the document data.
